name: @psiclawops/hypermem
description: Agent-centric memory and context composition engine for OpenClaw

scripts.test: node test/smoke.mjs && node test/redis-integration.mjs && node test/cross-agent.mjs && node test/vector-search.mjs && node test/library.mjs && node test/compositor.mjs && node test/fleet-cache.mjs && node test/rotation.mjs && node test/knowledge-graph.mjs && node test/rate-limiter.mjs && node test/doc-chunker.mjs && node test/compaction-fence-gate.mjs && node test/hybrid-retrieval.mjs && node test/live-org-registry.mjs && node test/multi-turn-session.mjs && node test/secret-scanner.mjs
scripts.test:quick: node test/smoke.mjs && node test/library.mjs && node test/compositor.mjs
scripts.validate:plugin-pipeline: npm --prefix plugin run build && node test/plugin-pipeline.mjs
scripts.test:ci: npm test && npm --prefix plugin run typecheck

author: PsiClawOps
